instructions: Project: {{PROJECT_NAME}}. Focus on cross-file consistency, architectural drift, and inter-file invariants the existing CI checks (Type Check, Lint, Build, Test, Repo Structure, Install) cannot catch. Trust the existing CI for lint/format/typecheck. The Codex GitHub Action is the line-level / narrow lane; Greptile fills the codebase-wide / cross-file lane. Both reviewers are advisory; merge gating is the required CI checks.
